race.comment: STAR DECORUM (8) got home with plenty in hand last time out here. Has a decent record at this track and winning rider stays aboard. Can make it two on the bounce. UNISPHERE (11) hasn't been too far away in both runs back and should be hitting his straps now third-up. Drawn sticky but rates highly one best figures and is one of the main dangers.  AUGUSTA ROCK (2) met with solid support last time out but could only manage to finish sixth here. The form around him though is stacking up and so does his best figures. Freshened with a month between and is drawn cosy. Worth some thought. BYWATERS ROAD (7) started this preparation with a win but wasn't as effective last time out. No reason he can't bounce back sharply third-up.
